text: I wander through this sterile, luminous corridor, feeling a sense of anticipation. As I enter the glass-walled room marked 'R+D,' I am enveloped by colors, shapes, and curated screens. There is a hum in the air—a tension between exposure and concealment. The text on the screen resonates: I feel both seen and strangely isolated, as though the very act of being observed changes my experience. In this space, I am both the watcher and the watched, caught in a reflective, almost experimental state of mind.
